tiers.tier_name: Diamond Community Lending - Eligible Census Tract

additional_rules.description: Diamond Community Lending Program (CLP) offers CRA pricing incentive up to 2.0 points on eligible census tracts. Agency guidelines with overlays. Property must be in a Diamond-designated eligible census tract. No income restriction. Primary residence only. Fixed rate only. Non-occupant co-borrower allowed. EAD not eligible. FTHB not required.
additional_rules.cra_incentive: Up to $4,500 CLP incentive cap, 2.0 points on purchase and refinance loans

general_notes: Diamond Community Lending Program (CLP) offers CRA pricing incentive on eligible census tracts across all 50 states (both GMCC and LO must be licensed in the state).
Agency loan amounts: Conforming and High Balance. No jumbo.
No income restriction — no max income level required.
Primary residence only. 2-4 units OK. Fixed rate only.
Max 97% LTV (MI required for LTV > 80%). Max DTI 50% per AUS findings.
Non-occupant co-borrower allowed. FTHB not required. EAD not eligible.
CLP incentive: up to $4,500 cap, 2.0 points on purchase and refinance.
Eligible areas can be verified at https://hub.collateralanalytics.com/correspondentsearch
